description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a streamlined, ergonomic design. The frame features a textured grip for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide is smooth with minimal visible markings, and the barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated into the grip, with no visible extensions or finger rests. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary handguns. The object is compact and designed for easy handling, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian self-defense scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip and smooth slide, featuring a flat magazine base and robust trigger guard. Its design is modern and streamlined, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the textured grip, smooth slide, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, slide, and trigger guard from the other profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a gentle curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a textured, stippled surface for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of polymer with a matte finish, lacking any visible logos or finger grooves. The design is minimalist, prioritizing function and ergonomics over decorative elements.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and lacks undercuts or squared-off edges, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no prominent visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears smooth and unmarked, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a minimalist design with no visible logos or texturing, maintaining a smooth and unobtrusive appearance.
